elements.description: A pair of hands clutching a jumble of random objects tightly, including old keys, a broken watch, and crumpled papers, against a pure white background.
A cluttered pile of useless items like a cracked mug, a single sock, and a dusty book, isolated on a white background.
A single hand hesitatingly placing an old, unused umbrella into a drawer filled with similar forgotten items, on a white background.
